ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_version" INTEGER /* Version of the sample */,
  "eukfrac" REAL /* Fraction of EUKARYOTA */,
  "cruise_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research cruise */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station within the cruise */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., B for bottle sample) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the sample was collected */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude where the sample was collected */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude where the sample was collected */,
  "bottom_depth" INTEGER /* Bottom depth at the sampling location */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth at which the sample was collected */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the water at the sampling location */,
  "salinity" REAL /* Salinity of the water at the sampling location */,
  "cast_type" TEXT /* Type of cast used for sampling */,
  "cast_no" INTEGER /* Number of the cast */,
  "niskin" INTEGER /* Number of the Niskin bottle */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the sample */,
  "sample_status" TEXT /* Status of the sample (e.g., collected, analyzed, archived) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sample record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sample record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_niskin FOREIGN KEY ("niskin") REFERENCES niskin_bottles ("niskin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES sample_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_cruise_id FOREIGN KEY ("cruise_id") REFERENCES cruises ("cruise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_cast_type FOREIGN KEY ("cast_type") REFERENCES cast_types ("cast_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cruises" (
  "cruise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research cruise */,
  "cruise_name" TEXT /* Name of the research cruise */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research cruise */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research cruise */,
  "chief_scientist" TEXT /* Name of the chief scientist on the cruise */,
  "research_focus" TEXT /* Primary research objective of the cruise */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the research vessel used */,
  "cruise_report" TEXT /* URL or file path of the cruise report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cruise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the station */,
  "station_status" TEXT /* Status of the station (e.g., active, inactive, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sample type */,
  "sample_type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sample type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast_types" (
  "cast_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast type */,
  "cast_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cast type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cast type */,
  "cast_type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cast type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "niskin_bottles" (
  "niskin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Niskin bottle */,
  "bottle_no" INTEGER /* Number of the Niskin bottle */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the Niskin bottle */,
  "bottle_status" TEXT /* Status of the Niskin bottle (e.g., available, in_use, damaged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("niskin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the sample was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* ID of the sample analyzed */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Parameter analyzed */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter value */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "analysis_version" INTEGER /* Version of the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_analysis_parameter FOREIGN KEY ("parameter") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_analysis_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_analysis_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the analyst belongs to */,
  "analyst_institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliation of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "parameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the equipment (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of last maintenance */,
  "equipment_model" TEXT /* Model number of the equipment */,
  "equipment_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of last calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance event */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment maintained */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Person who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* ID of the sample the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, Excel, JSON) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data file contents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)
